hey everyone it's me again (n.n) i haven't really been on vingle much....
I have something to get off my chest but please before you leave or just skip this card. give me a chance hear me out because I really can't do this alone... it's important and I need help or support or advice something... I know I might be annoying with this type of stuff... I bet I am to most of you... hehe... I'm sorry....
Okay so here it is...
I've gotten bored of vingle and I'm losing interest in kpop...
Okay wait before you lash out on me or think I'm crazy hear me out
I'm not kidding when I say this but I've gotten bored of vingle....
It changed so much and I miss the way it use to be...
kpop... I feel like it became more of a popularity thing or you have to support one group more but when I first join h
